title: GitHub - nibzard/llm-loop: Autonomous task execution plugin for LLM CLI - refactored modular architecture
summary: LLM Loop is an autonomous task execution plugin for the LLM CLI that enables persistent, multi-turn code generation and software development tasks. It allows an AI model to iteratively call tools (file manipulation, code analysis, git commands) to achieve a user-defined goal, such as building web applications, generating documentation, or setting up repositories. Features include tool integration, conversation management, safety approvals, and configurable turn limits.
author: nibzard
